title: "LSA-Mielnicka-vignette"
author: "Monika Mielnicka"
date: "3/3/2024"
output: html_document
---




## R Markdown

# Function made by Francesco for pretty graphs


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggtheme <- function(legend.position = "bottom") {
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) %+replace%
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
          legend.position = legend.position,
          legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 14))
}
```
:::


# summary function

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
data_summary <- function(x) {
  m <- mean(x)
  ymin <- m-sd(x)
  ymax <- m+sd(x)
  return(c(y=m,ymin=ymin,ymax=ymax))
}
```
:::


# data load GFP line

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
gfp_breeding_table = readxl::read_xlsx(path = "Mielnicka et al. 2024 source data.xlsx", sheet = 7)
head(gfp_breeding_table)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 6 × 18
  maleID     genotype cage  pregnancy birth_date          no_pups_born males...7
  <chr>      <chr>    <chr>     <dbl> <dttm>                     <dbl> <chr>    
1 MBO-000971 KO       bmbo…         1 2019-10-27 00:00:00            7 4        
2 MBO-000971 KO       bmbo…         2 2019-11-17 00:00:00            9 4        
3 MBO-000971 KO       bmbo…         3 2020-01-20 00:00:00           11 4        
4 MBO-000971 KO       bmbo…         4 2020-02-16 00:00:00            9 4        
5 MBO-000971 KO       bmbo…         5 2020-04-02 00:00:00            8 NA       
6 MBO-000972 KO       bmbo…         1 2019-11-04 00:00:00            9 2        
# ℹ 11 more variables: females...8 <chr>, weight_at_birth <chr>,
#   no_of_pups_weaned <dbl>, males...11 <chr>, females...12 <chr>,
#   weight_at_weaning <chr>, end_of_breeding <dttm>, DOB <dttm>,
#   breeding_start_date <dttm>, time_of_breeding <dbl>, fathers_age <dbl>
```


:::
:::

# birth weights for progeny sired by GFP/GFP males vs WT


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# graph 
gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = genotype, y = weight_at_birth, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 5, size = 2) +
  labs(y="Weight of pups at birth (g)", x = "") +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title="genotype")) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("WT", "KO"), labels = c("WT", "gfp/gfp")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "genotype", labels = c("gfp/gfp", "WT")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) +
  ggtheme()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](LSA-vignette_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# testing

gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  t_test(weight_at_birth ~ genotype, alternative = "two.sided") %>%
  add_significance()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 1 × 9
  .y.             group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic    df          p p.signif
  <chr>           <chr>  <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl>      <dbl> <chr>   
1 weight_at_birth KO     WT       188   199      4.59  380. 0.00000611 ****    
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  dplyr::rename(genotype = genotype) %>%
  group_by(genotype) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(weight_at_birth), median = median(weight_at_birth), sd = sd(weight_at_birth))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 2 × 4
  genotype  mean median    sd
  <chr>    <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>
1 KO        1.40    1.4 0.187
2 WT        1.31    1.3 0.176
```


:::
:::

# weaning weights for progeny sired by GFP/GFP males vs WT


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
#graph
gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_weaning, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_weaning = col_double())) %>%
  drop_na(weight_at_weaning) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = genotype, y = weight_at_weaning, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, shape = 5, size = 0.5) +
  labs(y="Weight of pups at weening (g)", x = "") +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title="genotype")) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("WT", "KO"), labels = c("WT", "gfp/gfp")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "genotype", labels = c("gfp/gfp", "WT")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) +
  ggtheme()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_segment()`).
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](LSA-vignette_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
#testing

gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_weaning, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_weaning = col_double())) %>%
  drop_na(weight_at_weaning) %>%
  t_test(weight_at_weaning ~ genotype, alternative = "greater") %>%
  add_significance()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 1 × 9
  .y.               group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic    df     p p.signif
  <chr>             <chr>  <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <chr>   
1 weight_at_weaning KO     WT       169   193      1.53  353. 0.064 ns      
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
gfp_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  drop_na(weight_at_birth) %>%
  group_by(genotype) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(weight_at_birth), median = median(weight_at_birth), sd = sd(weight_at_birth))
```

# birth weights for progeny sired by PHD/PHD males vs WT


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
phd_breeding_table %>%
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  drop_na(weight_at_birth) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = genotype, y = weight_at_birth, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", shape=23, size=2) +
  labs(y="Weight of pups at birth (g)", x = "") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("WT", "KO"), labels = c("WT", "phd")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "genotype", labels = c("phd", "WT")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) +
  ggtheme()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](LSA-vignette_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
#testing

  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
  type_convert(col_types = cols(weight_at_birth = col_double())) %>%
  drop_na(weight_at_birth) %>%
  t_test(weight_at_birth ~ genotype) %>%
  add_significance()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

  .y.             group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic    df      p p.signif

```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%

  group_by(genotype) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(weight_at_birth), median = median(weight_at_birth), sd = sd(weight_at_birth))
```

# litter sizes GFP

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
gfp_breeding_table %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = genotype, y = no_pups_born, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, geom="point", shape=23, size=2) +
  labs(y="litter size distribution", x = "") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("WT", "KO"), labels = c("WT", "phd")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "genotype", labels = c("phd", "WT")) +
```

```{.r .cell-code}
  separate_rows(weight_at_birth, sep = "-") %>%
```
